testcase.name: test_create_psp_transaction_stores_reserve_fund_amount
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_psp_currency_conversion.py:108: in test_create_psp_transaction_stores_reserve_fund_amount assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create transaction failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create transaction failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","client_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","transaction_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","amount"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
